timeline.title: Timeline Visualizer
timeline.description: This tool allows you to create a visual rotation timeline (e.g. for a raid). You can select students, adjust the spacing between them, set the cost/timestamp at which the student's skill cost should be used, and more.
timeline.notice: Note: Dark mode extensions and zoom levels may cause rendering issues in the resulting image. If the generated image looks weird, try disabling any dark mode extensions you may have and using 100% zoom.
timeline.mobileNotice: Note: This tool might not work well on mobile devices.
timeline.clickToEditPreview: Click any item in the preview below to edit its details. You can also drag the items around to reorder them.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Timeline Name
settings.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this timeline (optional)

description.signedIn: You have unsaved changes in your timeline. Would you like to save it in the cloud before leaving the page?
description.signedOut: You have unsaved changes in your timeline. Would you like to save it in your browser before leaving the page?

bond.title: Relationship Rank Calculator
bond.description: Using this tool you can calculate the relationship rank of a student based on what gifts you give to them. This tool can be useful if you want to plan gifts ahead or if you want to check your gift saving progress.

item.universal: This gift is {expValue, plural, 60 {adored} other {loved}} by everyone and gives {exp} EXP!

choiceBox.name: Gift Choice Box
choiceBox.description: A gift box that lets you choose the gift you want.

student.notice: To get started, select a student from the dropdown above.

irrelevantGifts.title: Notice
irrelevantGifts.description: Some of the gifts you selected will not be displayed because they are not relevant to the selected student. In order to change them, uncheck the "Only Display Favorite Gifts" option.

breakdown.title: Gift Breakdown
breakdown.description: Breakdown of gifts and their EXP values.

bond.inventoryTip: Tip: to save your gift inventory and bond targets (BETA).

remaining.title: EXP Needed to Reach Rank {targetBond}: {expNeeded}
remaining.description: In order to go from Rank {currentBond} to Rank {targetBond}, you will need one of the following:
remaining.optimalNote: * Note: The optimal breakdown is calculated based on a total of {paddedExp} EXP.

lessons.title: Lessons Breakdown
lessons.description: If you wanted to gain {exp} EXP through lessons alone, here's how many lessons it would take you at each rank and level.

deleteInventory.title: Delete Gift Inventory?
deleteInventory.description: Are you sure you want to delete this gift inventory? The gift counts, as well as all the associated targets will be permanently removed.

deleteTarget.title: Delete Gift Target?
deleteTarget.description: Are you sure you want to delete this gift target? The bond data, as well as the selected gifts will be permanently removed. Your gift inventory will not be affected.

save.title: Save target data?
save.description: You have unsaved changes in your bond setup. Would you like to save them in the cloud before leaving the page?

raidScore.title: Raid Score Calculator
raidScore.description: You can use this tool to convert between clear time and raid score for a given boss and difficulty.

clearTime.label: Clear Time
clearTime.hint: The total clear time of the raid, sum of times from all teams.

remainingTime.label: Remaining Time
remainingTime.hint: The remaining time a team has when reaching 0 HP. This is niche and only useful for 1-team clears.

score.label: Raid Score
score.hint: The raid score value. Can only be a number. Commas not required, supports decimal values.

gachaStats.title: Gacha Rate Stats
gachaStats.description: A tool you can use to get basic stats about your Blue Archive gacha pulls. Enter how many 3★ students you got on each 10-pull and click on the Add attempt button to add it to the stats. You can use the Remove button next to each attempt to remove it if you've made a mistake.
gachaStats.notice: Tip: You can use this tool to display your pull stats in real time if you're recording or streaming your pulls by adding a Browser Source in OBS, cropping it to the stats square, and keying out the background.
gachaStats.question: How many 3★s did you get on this attempt?

emblem.title: Title Generator
emblem.description: This tool allows you to generate fully rendered user titles for boss completions, relationship rank, talent levels, school clubs, as well as generic titles with custom text.

default.warning: Warning: It may take a while to load all titles depending on the mode you've selected.

formationDisplay.title: Formation Display
formationDisplay.description: Generate an image of a student formation. Useful for things like YouTube thumbnails.
formationDisplay.descriptionLong: This tool allows you to generate an image of a student formation. This can be useful for cases such as designing clean YouTube thumbnails.
formationDisplay.mobileNotice: Note: This tool might not work well on mobile devices.
formationDisplay.renderNotice: Note: Dark mode extensions and zoom levels may cause rendering issues in the resulting image. If the generated image looks weird, try disabling any dark mode extensions you may have and using 100% zoom.

saveDialog.title: Save formation?
saveDialog.description: You have unsaved changes in your formation. Would you like to save it in the cloud before leaving the page?

toasts.noStudents: You must add at least one student to the formation.

myFormations.title: My Formations
myFormations.description: Here you can view and manage your saved formations.

scenarioImageGenerator.title: Scenario Image Generator
scenarioImageGenerator.description: Create and generate images that resemble fake Blue Archive scenario/story screenshots.
scenarioImageGenerator.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Some of the assets used in this tool were extracted from HansTNO's template.

recording.title: Recording Mode
recording.description: You're about to enter recording mode. Prepare your screen recording software to capture the browser window. Click on the following button when you feel ready to start recording.
recording.escHint: You can quit recording mode by pressing the Esc key (twice if you're in full screen).

pvp.title: PVP Tracker
pvp.description: This tool allows you to track your PVP battles in Blue Archive.
pvp.needAccount: You need an account to use the PVP Tracker tool.

season.title: Season: {name}
season.failedToLoad: Failed to load PVP matches for this season.

match.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this PVP match record? This action cannot be undone.
match.deleteFail: Failed to delete PVP match record.

newSeason.title: New PVP Season
newSeason.description: Enter the name and game server of this PVP season.

toasts.matchSaveFail: Failed to save match. Please try again.

railroad.title: Railroad Puzzle Solver
railroad.description: This tool helps you solve/visualize the path to take when placing your railroad tracks in the Highlander event's minigame. You can also generate the most optimal combinations of railroad pieces to use if you want to minimize your event currency use.

hexagon.startTileDesc: This is where the train will depart from.
hexagon.goalTileDesc: This is where the train needs to arrive.
hexagon.stationTileDesc: The train must pass through this tile using a {railType} piece.
hexagon.stationTileWithDirections:
The train must pass through this tile
from {entrance} to {exit}
using a {railType} piece.
hexagon.railPieceDesc:
Connects a tile from {entrance} to {exit}
using a {railType} piece.

toasts.noSolution: No solution found with the given number of rails.
toasts.noSolutionForAoba: You can only use this function if there's a solution.

inventoryManagement.title: Inventory Management
inventoryManagement.description: This tool allows you to simulate the probabilities of each item's placement in the inventory management events (e.g. Aoi's event).
inventoryManagement.notice: Note: While the tool does have some biases and multiple checks in place to finetune the probabilities, at the end of the day, it can still result in false positives, especially when the board contains many small items. Use the results as a guideline, not as a guarantee.

confirmNextRound.title: Proceed to Next Round?
confirmNextRound.description: Are you sure you want to load the next round? This will reset the current setup.

presetDialog.title: Select Inventory Management Preset
presetDialog.description: Select an event preset to load into the inventory management simulator.

toasts.invalidRound: Invalid round index for the selected preset.
toasts.cannotBlockOutside: Cannot block cells outside the grid.

myRosters.title: My Rosters
myRosters.description: Here you can view and manage your rosters which you can share publicly.
myRosters.pageDescription: View and manage your Blue Archive rosters.

toasts.fail: Failed to update roster. Please try again.

timelineGroupView.defaultDescription: A group of visual EX skill rotation timelines.

myTimelines.title: My Timelines
myTimelines.description: Here you can view and manage your saved timelines.
myTimelines.allTimelinesGroupDescription: This group contains all your timelines.
myTimelines.groupContains: This group contains {count, plural, one {# timeline} other {# timelines}}.

createGroup.title: Create Timeline Group
createGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: A description of this timeline group (optional)

editGroup.title: Edit Timeline Group
editGroup.noTimelinesInGroup: This group does not have any timelines yet.

studentOfTheDay.title: Student of the Day
studentOfTheDay.viewYours: View Your Student of the Day
studentOfTheDay.viewGlobal: View Global Student of the Day
